name: Stadt Land Vollpfosten: Das Kartenspiel — Christmas Edition
description: Stadt Land Vollpfosten: Das Kartenspiel — Christmas Edition is the holiday spin on Germany's wildly popular party-card adaptation of "Stadt Land Fluss" — draw a category card, flip a letter, and race your friends to scribble festive answers (cities, animals, foods, gifts) starting with that letter on your scoring sheet. Absurd or absent answers earn the most laughs; matching answers cancel each other out. Quick, loud, and perfect for German-speaking holiday parties.
